titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD55/139

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=411 status=live modified=2021-04-06 15:05:45.34229+00 | translation moa=412 status=live modified=2021-04-06 15:05:47.106739+00

p.cl:
Sciant omnes hanc Cartam visuri vel audituri quod ego Symon de lyndesie dedi et concessi et presenti
Carta mea confirmaui Helene filie mee terram meam de hungerigge quam teneo In territorio de Molle
de Roberto de polloch et vxore eius ysabell’ . Et quoddam pratum sub Ederedesete . quod vocatur holemede .
quod teneo de Domina Eschyna et heredibus suis . Tenendam et habendam sibi et heredibus suis de dicto Roberto et
heredibus suis . et de Domina Eschyna et heredibus suis . libere et quiete ab omni seruicio et auxilio et exaccione .
Reddendo inde annuatim dicto Roberto et heredibus suis decem solidos . scilicet quinque solidos . ad pentecostes  et quinque solidos .
ad festum sancti Martini . Et Domine eschyne et heredibus suis vnum Nysum sor ad Nundinas Rokeburgie .
Si uero contingat quod dicta Helena sine liberis in fata decesserit  volo quod Eschyna filia mea
soror eius et heredes eius ei in dicta terra succedant . Hanc uero terram dicte helene et heredibus eius contuli
et assignaui adeo libere et quiete in omnibus et per omnia  sicut Carta dicti Roberti et uxoris eius ysabell’ . et
confirmatio heredum Domine eschyne de Moll’ inde confecta  donant et testantur .

Hiis testibus . Symone
Mauleuerer . Giliberto auenel . Ricardo de lincoln’ . Rad’ le Neym . Symone de grubbeheued . Ada de
yetham . Ada filio Nicholai . et Multis aliis :

Let all who shall see or hear this charter know that I, Simon of Lindsay, have given and granted and by my present charter made firm to Helen my daughter my land at ‘Hungerigge’ that I hold in the territory of Mow of Robert of Pollok and his wife Isabel, and a certain meadow within ‘Ederedesete’ that is called ‘Holemede’, which I hold of the lady Eschyna and her heirs; for her and her heirs to hold and to have of the said Robert and his heirs, and of the lady Eschyna and her heirs, free and quit of every service and aid and exaction; by annually returning thereupon to the said Robert and his heirs ten shillings, that is five shillings at Pentecost and five shillings at the feast of St Martin; and to the lady Eschyna and her heirs one red not moulted hawk at the Roxburgh Fair. And if it should happen that the said Helen has died by ill fortune without issue, I will that my daughter Eschina, her sister and heir, succeed her in the said land. And I have bestowed and entrusted the said land to Helen and her heirs as freely and quitely in all things and through all things as the charter of the said Robert and his wife Isabel, and the confirmation of the heirs of the lady Eschina of Mow composed thereupon, confer and bear witness.
